scripts.format:check: pnpm exec prettier --check package.json README.md .github/workflows/pipeline.yml .github/workflows/README.md apps/api/package.json
scripts.package:python: uv build --directory python/ade-engine && uv build --directory python/ade-config-template
scripts.ci:preflight: pnpm run lint && pnpm run format:check && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test:unit && pnpm run package:python
scripts.ci:commit: pnpm run ci:preflight && pnpm run build
